summary: BLOCKs 453, 457, 407, 413 - All features verified working. Fixed critical React hooks violation in VariantReleasePage.js.

issues: 503 errors from image CDN - these are expected CORS blocks from external discogs images, handled by proxy fallback

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 453 VERIFIED: ComposerBar.js fetchTracklist (lines 176-207) has console.log debug, normalizes track data (handles both 'tracklist' and 'tracks' keys), Refresh button visible when tracklist unavailable
BLOCK 453 VERIFIED: Tracklist dropdown shows position (A1, A2, etc.) and title for each track - Born To Die shows 12 tracks correctly
BLOCK 457 VERIFIED: AlbumArt.js line 77 has crossOrigin='anonymous', onError handler (lines 79-86) uses proxyImageUrl fallback
BLOCK 457 VERIFIED: DailyPrompt.js line 151 has crossOrigin='anonymous', onError handler (lines 156-161) uses proxyImageUrl fallback
BLOCK 407 VERIFIED: spin-record-search input (line 440) does NOT have autoFocus attribute
BLOCK 407 VERIFIED: iso-discogs-search input (line 762) does NOT have autoFocus attribute
BLOCK 407 VERIFIED: note-text-input textarea (line 821) does NOT have autoFocus attribute
BLOCK 413 VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/vinyl/release/{id} returns stats_source ('variant' or 'master') and master_id in scarcity object
BLOCK 413 VERIFIED: Backend supports ?force_refresh=true to bust cache
BLOCK 413 VERIFIED: VariantReleasePage shows Re-sync button with data-testid='resync-btn'
BLOCK 413 VERIFIED: Stats subtitle shows 'Variant-specific stats' when stats_source is 'variant' (Born To Die has variant stats)
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user collection data (Born To Die discogs_id=3433715)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCKs 453, 457, 407, 413 all verified working. Fixed React hooks violation in VariantReleasePage.js (useState was called after conditional returns). Test user has Born To Die (discogs_id=3433715) - tracklist shows 12 tracks with positions A1-B6. Variant page shows 'Variant-specific stats' with Re-sync button. Streaming links are MOCKED.

block_453_tracklist_fetch.details: fetchTracklist correctly parses tracks from Discogs, console.log shows '[Tracklist] Parsed 12 tracks'

block_453_tracklist_dropdown.details: Tracklist dropdown shows position (A1, A2, A3...) and title for each track

block_453_refresh_button.details: Refresh button (data-testid='spin-track-refresh') appears when tracklist unavailable

block_457_proxy_fallback_albumart.details: AlbumArt.js onError handler uses proxyImageUrl() for fallback

block_407_no_autofocus_spin_search.details: spin-record-search input does NOT have autoFocus attribute

block_407_no_autofocus_iso_search.details: iso-discogs-search input does NOT have autoFocus attribute

block_407_no_autofocus_note_input.details: note-text-input textarea does NOT have autoFocus attribute

block_413_stats_source_field.details: GET /api/vinyl/release/{id} returns stats_source in scarcity object

block_413_master_id_field.details: GET /api/vinyl/release/{id} returns master_id in scarcity object

block_413_resync_button.details: VariantReleasePage shows Re-sync button with data-testid='resync-btn'

block_413_stats_source_label.details: Stats subtitle shows 'Variant-specific stats' when stats_source is 'variant'

bug_fix_applied.issue: React Hook 'useState' called conditionally - useState was at line 66 after conditional early returns (lines 44-62)
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved useState(false) for resyncing state to line 35 with other useState declarations at component top level

mocked_api_note: Streaming links (Spotify/Apple Music) are MOCKED. Discogs API is REAL.
